description:
Advances: mutagen.cli, mutagen.mutation_enumeration

Closes **F28 / CF11** (MEDIUM consensus from Security + Performance — Security M1, Performance F-PERF-07/12).

CLI accepts unlimited repetition of `--scope` / `--tests`. The enumerator materializes every site in memory before the runner starts. No aggregate budget. Per-site timeout doesnt bound the whole run. Three avenues for runaway resource use.

## Deliverable

- Cap `--scope` / `--tests` repetition at 100 each. Reject excess with `:too_many_targets`.
- Cap total enumerated sites at a sensible upper bound (e.g. 10,000). Configurable via `--max-sites`.
- Add `--budget-ms <N>` for aggregate wall-clock budget. When exceeded, the runner terminates gracefully and emits a partial JSON report with `truncated: true`.
- Fix `phase_scope` O(n²): the `acc ++ records` accumulation in lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex:311-323 — prepend-then-reverse. (This is a half-overlap with F20 / `.25`; do it here since its at the same touch points.)
- Revise `.spec/specs/cli.spec.md` + `.spec/specs/mutation_enumeration.spec.md` accordingly.

## Verification

- New cli_test.exs: 101 scopes → `:too_many_targets`; 10,001 sites → `:too_many_sites`; budget elapsed → partial report
- Benchmark: `phase_scope` with 1000 records — assert O(n) not O(n²) via timing or operation count
- mix test green

## Allowed touches

- lib/mutagen_ex/cli.ex
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex (phase_scope + aggregate budget)
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex (site cap)
- .spec/specs/cli.spec.md, mutation_enumeration.spec.md
- Corresponding test files
- README.md, CHANGELOG.md

## Out of Scope

- Streaming the enumerator (Stream.transform conversion) — that is F44 / `.25` (AST/perf mega)
- NDJSON output streaming — that is F17 / `.30`

## Merge gate
- [ ] mix test green / strict pre-merge green
- [ ] Cap-enforcement tests pass
- [ ] phase_scope O(n) regression test passes
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE

IMPLEMENTED
Session: 866c9970-ee52-41f7-b573-aa2ec26231c0
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/866c9970-ee52-41f7-b573-aa2ec26231c0.jsonl

Commit: 083f8f5 (on stage branch mutagen-wrd.22/cli-caps-budget, based off epic/mutagen-wrd @ 9882d4a)
Files touched:
- lib/mutagen_ex/cli.ex
- lib/mutagen_ex/config.ex
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex
- lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex
- .spec/specs/cli.spec.md
- .spec/specs/mutation_enumeration.spec.md
- README.md
- CHANGELOG.md
- test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs
- test/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator_test.exs
- test/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner_test.exs
- test/mutagen_ex/mix_task_phase_scope_test.exs (new)
- test/mutagen_ex/golden/*.json (16 fixtures, REGEN=1 for new truncated field)

Tests added:
- CLITest "--scope/--tests repetition cap (mutagen.cli.r11)" — 4 tests: 100 boundary OK, 101 refused, 501 still refused, --tests 101 refused
- CLITest "--max-sites (mutagen.cli.r11)" — 5 tests: default, positive int, 0/negative/non-integer rejections
- CLITest "--budget-ms (mutagen.cli.r12)" — 5 tests: nil default, positive int, 0/negative/non-integer rejections
- CLITest moduledoc r11/r12 keyword assertion
- MutationEnumeratorTest "r7 — --max-sites cap" — 3 tests: exceeding cap returns :too_many_sites, exact-cap success, absent-option unbounded
- MutationRunnerTest "r12: --budget-ms aggregate wall-clock" — 3 tests: elapsed budget halts loop + truncated, nil budget back-compat, oversize budget never truncates
- MutagenEx.MixTaskPhaseScopeTest (new file) — 3 tests: order preservation single-record, order preservation multi-record chunks, O(n) regression (2000 targets × 5 records < 2000ms)

Verification stubs flipped:
- mutagen.cli.v6 (covers r11) → execute: true
- mutagen.cli.v7 (covers r12) → execute: true
- mutagen.mutation_enumeration.v4 (covers r7) → execute: true

Summary: Closes F28 / CF11. The CLI now caps --scope/--tests repetition at 100, rejects excess with :too_many_targets; --max-sites (default 10_000) caps enumerated mutation sites with :too_many_sites; --budget-ms is an optional aggregate wall-clock cap that emits a graceful truncated:true partial JSON report instead of aborting. phase_scope's O(n²) acc++records accumulation was replaced with prepend-then-flatten, asserted by a new mix_task_phase_scope_test.exs that runs 10_000 records across 2_000 targets under 2_000ms. Specs (cli + mutation_enumeration) gained r11/r12/r7 with scenarios + new verification stubs. README + CHANGELOG updated.

mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean. mix test: 419 tests, 0 failures (15 excluded). mix test --include e2e_slow: 432 tests, 0 failures (2 excluded).

Note: epic/mutagen-wrd has advanced 2 commits past the base of this stage worktree (mutagen-wrd.24 and mutagen-wrd.20 landed while this work was in flight). Orchestrator will need to rebase/merge.

title: Caps on --scope/--tests/total sites + --budget-ms + phase_scope O(n) fix
